{{Quote|You're the second wise-mouth droid I've met. If I never meet another one, my life would not suffer a bit.|[[Kornell Divini]] to C-4ME-0|<ref name="Death Star (novel)">[[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']]</ref>}}
'''C-4ME-O''', or '''Fourmio''', was a secretary droid stationed on ''[[MedStar Four]]'' during its deployment to [[Despayre]] in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]. It stood on a single gyroscopically balanced wheel. It was later assigned to aid Dr. [[Kornell Divini]] during his stint aboard [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star I]].

{{Droid-stub}}
